leadText: Scorched Slab (Japanese: 日照りの岩戸 Drought Cave) is a small cave found in Hoenn. It can be accessed by surfing in an indented lake on Route 120 near Fortree City. In Generation III, there is nothing here other than a single item, TM11 (Sunny Day). In Generation VI, Scorched Slab has four floors and several other items, as well as being home to Heatran.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Origin [ edit | edit source ] Scorched Slab is modeled after one of the real-life locations that is claimed to be Ama-no-Iwato , the cave where the sun goddess Amaterasu shut herself in for a long time in Japanese mythology . This explains why the one thing that can be found in Scorched Slab in Generation III is TM11 ( Sunny Day ).
